---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement.
title: "[REQUEST] Brief description of the feature"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Proposed Enhancement**
A clear and concise description of the functionality you would like to see added.

**Use Case**
Describe how this feature improves the DLC management experience.

**Implementation Suggestions**
If you have ideas on how this should be integrated into the existing `dlc_dashboard` or `content.js` logic, please provide them here.

**Visual Prototype**
Describe how the UI should change to accommodate this feature (following Steam-native styling).
